name: ichungjal-mobile-wrapper
description: Android/iOS wrapper for the existing React + FastAPI app using Capacitor

scripts.prepare:web: cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.sync:android: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.sync:ios: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.sync:all: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync
